lg.l: With the flower cloth that matches in decorative beauty the sun [among?] clouds
that have climbed up the sapphire mountain, with the ornate crown,
with the garland that alternates in colour, like the gold-and-jewel waterfall
that tumbles from the cracked mountain, with the banner made with the sign of a bird,
oh Māl, with the frightful discus who has taken up cool compassion
so that the moon in the sky that has taken up compassion, may take [it] as a decoration,
with hands that hold up the discus and the conch,
similar in shining to the two different orbs
that adorn the dark sky because the [rainy] season has come,
for those worship your sacred mountain chest
that is adorned with a string the colour of a waterfall
[and] a golden ornament that shines [and] glows like lightning accumulated,
heaven too is right for residing; they well possess the right.
all those are you, majesty of killing battle,
and the instument for grasping all those are you;
among the five we spoke of before,
you are the sky that one praise by one,
you are the wind that one perceives by two,
you are the fire that one perceives by three,
you are the water that one perceives by four
and you are the earth that is complete with all five.
Therefore, from your side are the thrice seven worlds,
the origin, the dharma, time that is beyond
origin, the sky and, along with the wind, the fire.
On the bed pleasing to see that is [the one with] a precious head with forked tongue
that expands into a thousand [heads] with glowing gems that shine with lightning,
in the middle of the milk sea that is close to it in colour
becoming the one of conscious sleep who wears Tulsi,
the one with a plough with cuved blade that ploughs the vital spots
like the dug-up earth, constantly growing in strength, abounding in victory
that destroys the lives of those who come, overstepping [their] power,
with an army killing opposition, with ample noise, abundant in valour,
and the boar with a shining bright tusk
that keeps suspended on [its] whole base, so that distress ceases, the earth,
as a large ornament of sapphire leaves adorned with gold-made petals,
you are one who separates to as to become three forms.
You are the unbending lord who has taken as [his] banner
the enemy of snakes, many coloured, with spreading wings.
O lord with the lofty high banner with a male bird, you are one with good praises
that are told in the pleasing old words (~Veda) strong in music.
You with a body shining ornately that resembles those five:
rain cloud, blooming bilberry, ocean, wonderful darkness, sapphire.
With words of grace [and] of anger that resemble those four,
right-spiralling conch, true word (~ Veda?) rumbling of the shaking cloud, thunder,
surpassing those three: what has been accomplished, was is accomplished and
what will bud, you have them under the shade of your suitable anklet[ted feet].
You whose mind is attached to the one task [of protecting]
those who praise you who are without twofold karma.
Lotusses with generous petals that opened beyond the leaves
are [your] feet, hands, eyes and mouth.
You are big in bracelet, navel, ring that decorates the upper arms,
You are great in chest, hip and mind.
You are subtle in Śruti, Smṛti and Dharma.
You are hot in longing for sacrifice and valour.
O lord of victorious battle with a discus excelling in fight,
with red eyes that do not subdue unceasing pride,
you with a chest on which dwells the blooming Tulsi in strands
of a fragrant garland interspersed with the smile of the flame (Veṭci?),
thinking that you are thus/[our] mother we have worshipped your feet.
Many times we have bowed to [your] mountan side, we have praised.
Because of the result of the penance we did often before
even now itself this is our desire.
